mapper.insert: insert into bms_invoice_record (create_time, invoice_no, bill_id, amount, freeze_status, associate_id, operator_id, settlement_cat_id, settle_record_id, item_list, type) values (#{createTime}, #{invoiceNo}, #{billId}, #{amount}, #{freezeStatus}, #{associateId}, #{operatorId}, #{settlementCatId}, #{settleRecordId}, #{itemList}, #{type})
